query:
SELECT 
  r.id as run_id,
  r.module_id,
  r.scenario_id,
  r.is_demo,
  r.created_at,
  u.name as student_name,
  u.role,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as transaction_count,
  SUM(se.points_delta) as total_score
FROM runs r
JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.run_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN scoring_events se ON se.run_id = r.id
WHERE u.name = 'Expert Validator'
GROUP BY r.id, r.module_id, r.scenario_id, r.is_demo, r.created_at, u.name, u.role
ORDER BY r.id;
